headline: China-linked operatives weaponize ChatGPT for infrastructure policy influence
body: State-sponsored actors used OpenAI's ChatGPT to shape public discourse around U.S. data center policy and tariffs, according to reporting from Axios. The campaign demonstrates how large language models can be operationalized for geopolitical influence at scale. For healthcare AI stakeholders, this underscores critical supply chain risks and the need for robust governance frameworks around LLM deployment in clinical and operational environments. Healthcare organizations evaluating GPT-based tools must now consider not only model performance metrics but also the geopolitical context of their vendor partnerships and data residency requirements. This incident will likely accelerate discussions among healthcare IT leaders about building AI systems with enhanced transparency and provenance tracking.
